name: vehicle-diagnostic-cluster
description: 车规级车载诊断报文转发与过滤服务集群

scripts.cluster: start "Node-01" cmd /k "set NODE_ID=node-01&& node backend/server.js" && start "Node-02" cmd /k "set NODE_ID=node-02&& node backend/server.js" && start "Node-03" cmd /k "set NODE_ID=node-03&& node backend/server.js"

author: Vehicle Diagnostic Cluster
